module_info.docstring:
Tests for common mistake detection helpers and UX improvements.

These tests verify that the mistake detection helpers correctly identify:
1. Program names mistakenly used as agent names
2. Model names mistakenly used as agent names
3. Email addresses mistakenly used as agent names
4. Broadcast attempts
5. Descriptive role names
6. Suspicious file reservation patterns

methods.name: test_known_programs_are_detected
methods.docstring: Known program names should be detected.

methods.name: test_case_insensitive
methods.docstring: Detection should be case-insensitive.

methods.name: test_valid_agent_names_not_detected
methods.docstring: Valid agent names should not be detected as program names.

methods.name: test_known_model_patterns_detected
methods.docstring: Known model name patterns should be detected.

methods.name: test_case_insensitive
methods.docstring: Detection should be case-insensitive.

methods.name: test_valid_agent_names_not_detected
methods.docstring: Valid agent names should not be detected as model names.

methods.name: test_valid_emails_detected
methods.docstring: Email addresses should be detected.

methods.name: test_agent_names_not_detected
methods.docstring: Agent names should not be detected as emails.

methods.name: test_at_sign_only_not_detected
methods.docstring: Just an @ sign without proper domain should not be detected.

methods.name: test_broadcast_keywords_detected
methods.docstring: Broadcast keywords should be detected.

methods.name: test_case_insensitive
methods.docstring: Detection should be case-insensitive.

methods.name: test_agent_names_not_detected
methods.docstring: Agent names should not be detected as broadcasts.

methods.name: test_descriptive_suffixes_detected
methods.docstring: Names ending in descriptive suffixes should be detected.

methods.name: test_valid_agent_names_not_detected
methods.docstring: Valid adjective+noun names should not be detected as descriptive.

methods.name: test_detects_program_name
methods.docstring: Should detect program names with helpful message.

methods.name: test_detects_model_name
methods.docstring: Should detect model names with helpful message.

methods.name: test_detects_email
methods.docstring: Should detect email addresses with helpful message.

methods.name: test_detects_broadcast
methods.docstring: Should detect broadcast attempts with helpful message.

methods.name: test_detects_descriptive_name
methods.docstring: Should detect descriptive role names with helpful message.

methods.name: test_valid_agent_name_returns_none
methods.docstring: Valid agent names should return None (no mistake detected).

methods.name: test_overly_broad_patterns_detected
methods.docstring: Overly broad patterns should be flagged.

methods.name: test_absolute_paths_detected
methods.docstring: Absolute paths should be flagged.

methods.name: test_short_wildcard_patterns_detected
methods.docstring: Very short wildcard patterns should be flagged.

methods.name: test_valid_patterns_not_detected
methods.docstring: Valid specific patterns should not be flagged.

methods.name: test_double_slash_path_not_flagged_as_absolute
methods.docstring: Paths starting with // should not be flagged as absolute paths.
